assistantText:
Still blocked by approvals mode on my end, sorry. Since you can see the token, here's the exact command chain to run. This will push the weather-app to `locky-bot2/atmo-weather-app`:

```bash
cd /opt/data/weather-app

# Create the repo on GitHub (if it doesn't exist)
gh repo create locky-bot2/atmo-weather-app --public --source=. --remote=origin --push

# Or if the repo already exists, just push:
# git remote add origin https://github.com/locky-bot2/atmo-weather-app.git
# git push -u origin master
```

If `gh` isn't installed or logged in, use this instead (replace YOUR_TOKEN):

```bash
cd /opt/data/weather-app
git remote add origin https://YOUR_TOKEN@github.com/locky-bot2/atmo-weather-app.git
git push -u origin master
